attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

private HandleCollectTeaseSystemByCol(col: number): void {\\n        // 檢查第一輪是否剛停止，如果有 Collect 符號則觸發聽牌效果\\n        if (col === Game_Define.FIRST_COL) {\\n CheckAndTriggerFirstReelCollectTease(): void {\\n        const FIRST_REEL_COL = Game_Define.FIRST_COL; // 第一輪索引\\n        \\n        // 檢查第一輪是否已經處理過（避免重複觸發）\\n        if        // log(\\\"第一輪停下來且有 Collect 符號，已觸發聽牌效果（展開第一輪的背景）\\\");\\n            this.m_firstReelCollectChecked = true; // 標記已處理\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 在第六輪停輪時檢查並觸發 Collect 亮燈效果\\n (!this.m_plateInfoWithFakeSymbol || this.m_plateInfoWithFakeSymbol.length === 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const lastColumn = this.m_plateInfoWithFakeSymbol[LAST_REEL_COL];\\n        if (!lastColumn?.Col) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 遍歷第六輪的所有符號，檢查是否有 Collect\\n        let hasCollect = false;\\n        for (let row = 0; row < lastColumn.Col.length;  }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 如果第六輪有 Collect 符號，觸發亮燈效果事件（展開第六輪的背景）\\n        if (hasCollect) {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.SHOW_LIGHT_RIGHT_REEL); // 第六輪亮燈（展開背景）\\n    return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 如果該列已經套用過聽牌效果，不再重複套用\\n        if (this.m_teaseApplied[currentCol]) {\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        // }\\n\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 動態檢查並套用聽牌效果（在轉輪運行過程中），只檢查下一列\\n     */\\n    private CheckAndApplyTeaseEffectsByCol(col: number): void {\\n        if (!flyNode)\\n        {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (toNode)\\n        {\\n            // 獲取源位置的 SingleCell 並視需要壓暗字體/符號\\n            const sourceSingleCell = this.GetSingleCellFromColRow(col, row);\\n\\n            if (shouldDarken)\\n            {\\n                if (sourceSingleCell && sourceSingleCell.Label) {\\n                    // 壓暗字體顏色\\n                    sourceSingleCell.Label.color = Game_Define.Color.Dark;\\n                }\\n                // 同步壓暗該格的 symbol 圖\\n                sourceSingleCell?.SetSymbolDark( true );\\n            }\\n            \\n            const startWorldPos: Vec3 = flyNode.getWorldPosition();\\n            const endWorldPos: Vec3 = toNode.getWorldPosition();\\n            // collect 只會在第 1 列或第 6 列 (0-based: 0 或 5)\\n            // - collect 在第 1 列(0)：source 1-3(0,1,2)=short、4-6(3,4,5)=long\\n            // - collect 在第 6 列(5)：source 1-3(0,1,2)=long、4-6(3,4,5)=short\\n            const isLong =\\n                ( toNodeCol === 0 ) ? ( col >= 3 ) :\\n                ( toNodeCol === 5 ) ? }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定當前假轉輪帶 Seed（透過 GENERATE_FAKE_REEL_SEED 事件委派 FakeReelManager）\\n     * @param fileIndex 由呼叫者決定的檔案索引；建議透過 ResolveFakeReelFileIndex 取得\\n     * @param source 資料來源標記（'unshow' string = 'unknown') {\\n        const betMode = this.m_gameView.GetFakeReelBetMode();\\n\\n        // 既有 seed 的 betMode/fileIndex 跟新請求一致 → 沿用，避免重設 startPositions 造成跨 seed 取值不連續\\n        // 跨手 spin 或同 this.m_nowFakeReelSeed = seed;\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 獲取假轉輪帶隨機符號\\n     * @param reelIndex 轉輪索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.REEL-1)\\n     * @param count 要取得的符號數量 (正數=加，負數=自動計算)\\n     * @returns eventManager.Dispatch(FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_FAKE_REEL_SYMBOL_BY_SEED, this.m_nowFakeReelSeed, reelIndex, symbolCount, false, true, (result: SymbolInfo[]) => {\\n            symbols = result;\\n        });\\n\\n        // 更新假轉輪帶 Seed 位置，因為是往下轉\\n        this.ProcessFakeReelSeedPosition( reelIndex, -symbolCount );\\n\\n        // 把金額乘上目前的Bet再除以100\\n        const bet = }\\n        });\\n\\n        const reelMode = this.m_reelSymbolModes[ reelIndex ] ?? col < Game_Define.COL; col++ )\\n        {\\n            // 鎖定列不驗證\\n            if (this.m_lockColumn[ col ]) {\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            const targetCount = this.GetTargetSymbolCount( col );\\n            const actualUpper = this.m_allColumns[ UPPER_PLATE ]?.[ col ]?.Symbols ?? [];\\n            const actualLower = this.m_allColumns[ LOWER_PLATE ]?.[ col ]?.Symbols ?? [];\\n\\n            // 上假盤面驗證\\n            const upperServerCol = upperData?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n            if ( upperServerCol )\\n            {\\n                const serverCount = upperServerCol.length;\\n                let allMatch = true;\\n                const details: string[] = [];\\n                for ( let i = 0; i < targetCount; i++ )\\n                {\\n                    const actual = actualUpper[ i ] ?? '?';\\n                    if ( i === 0 && serverCount < targetCount )\\n                    {\\n                        // fake 補齊槽\\n                        details.push( `[0]:fake(${actual})` );\\n                    }\\n                    else\\n                    {\\n                        const serverIdx = serverCount < targetCount ? i - 1 : i;\\n                        const expected = upperServerCol[ serverIdx ]?.Symbol ?? '?';\\n                        const match = actual === expected;\\n                        if ( !match ) allMatch = false;\\n                        if ( isShowLog )\\n                        {\\n                            details.push( `[${i}]:${match ? '✅' : '❌'}(exp:${expected} act:${actual})` );\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                if ( !allMatch ) overallMatch = false;\\n                if ( isShowLog )\\n                {\\n                    warn( `  col${col} 上假盤面 ${allMatch ? '✅全符合' : '❌有不符'}: ${details.join( ' ' )}` );\\n                }\\n            }\\n            else if ( isShowLog )\\n            {\\n                warn( `  col${col} 上假盤面: 無 FakePlateSymbolUpper 資料，實際=${JSON.stringify( actualUpper )}` );\\n            }\\n\\n            // 下假盤面驗證\\n            const lowerServerCol = lowerData?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n            if ( lowerServerCol )\\n            {\\n                const serverCount = lowerServerCol.length;\\n                let allMatch = true;\\n                const details: string[] = [];\\n                for ( let i = 0; i < targetCount; i++ )\\n                {\\n                    const actual = actualLower[ i ] ?? '?';\\n                    if ( i === serverCount && serverCount < targetCount )\\n                    {\\n                        // fake 補齊槽\\n                        details.push( `[${i}]:fake(${actual})` );\\n                    }\\n                    else if ( i < serverCount )\\n                    {\\n                        const expected = lowerServerCol[ i ]?.Symbol ?? '?';\\n                        const match = actual === expected;\\n                        if ( !match ) allMatch = false;\\n                        if ( isShowLog )\\n                        {\\n                            details.push( `[${i}]:${match ? '✅' : '❌'}(exp:${expected} act:${actual})` );\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                if ( !allMatch ) overallMatch = false;\\n                if ( isShowLog )\\n                {\\n                    warn( `  col${col} 下假盤面 ${allMatch ? '✅全符合' : '❌有不符'}: ${details.join( ' ' )}` );\\n                }\\n            }\\n            else if ( isShowLog )\\n            {\\n                warn( `  col${col} 下假盤面: 無 FakePlateSymbolLower 資料，實際=${JSON.stringify( actualLower )}` );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        return overallMatch;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依照補齊規則，將 FakePlateSymbolUpper/Lower 資料轉換為 SymbolInfo[]\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     * @param isUpper true = 上假盤面；false = 下假盤面\\n     * @param data RoundInfo.FakePlateSymbolUpper 或 FakePlateSymbolLower\\n     * @returns SymbolInfo[]，資料無效時回傳 null（呼叫端 fallback 隨機假符號）\\n     *\\n     * 補齊規則（僅 4 格 col 觸發，5 格 col 直接使用全部資料）：\\n     *   上假盤面：index 0 = fake；index 1-4 = 資料\\n     *   下假盤面：index 0-3 = 資料；index 4 = fake\\n     */\\n    private BuildFakePlateSymbolInfosFromData(\\n        col: number,\\n        isUpper: boolean,\\n        data: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ICColumn[] | null | undefined\\n    ): SymbolInfo[] | null\\n    {\\n        if ( !data || col >= data.length || !data[ col ]?.Col )\\n        {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const serverCol = data[ col ].Col;\\n        const targetCount = this.GetTargetSymbolCount( col );\\n        const serverCount = serverCol.length;\\n        const combined: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ICSymbol[] = [];\\n\\n        if ( serverCount >= targetCount )\\n        {\\n            // 5 格 col（0、5），直接使用\\n            for ( let i = 0; i < targetCount; i++ )\\n            {\\n                combined.push( serverCol[ i ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        else if ( isUpper )\\n        {\\n            // 上假盤面補齊：index 0 = fake，index 1-4 = 資料\\n            combined.push( this.GenerateFakeCSymbol( [], col ) );\\n            for ( let i = 0; i <         for ( let i = 0; i < serverCount; i++ )\\n            {\\n                combined.push( serverCol[ i ] );\\n            }\\n            const existingSymbols = combined.map( cs => cs.Symbol ?? 0 );\\n            combined.push( this.GenerateFakeCSymbol( existingSymbols, col ) );\\n        }\\n\\n        return this.ConvertCSymbolsToSymbolInfos( combined, col );\\n    }\\n    //#endregion eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.RESTORE_ZOOM, ZOOM_OUT_DURATION, callback);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 震動效果\\n\\n    //#region RespinGame\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 播放RespinGame 該列的進入動畫\\n     *  @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     */\\n    private async PlayInAnimationInRespinGame(col: number) {\\n        const effectPlate = this.m_gameView.EffectPlate;\\n        if (effectPlate) {\\n            this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col] = true;\\n            effectPlate.SetFreeGameAddCashFrameShow(col, true);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 播放RespinGame 該列的退出動畫\\n     *  @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     */\\n    private async PlayOutAnimationInRespinGame(col: number) {\\n        const effectPlate = this.m_gameView.EffectPlate;\\n        if (effectPlate) {\\n            this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col] = false;\\n            effectPlate.SetFreeGameAddCashFrameShow(col, false);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 檢查並播放RespinGame 該列的動畫\\n     *  @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     */\\n    private async CheckAndPlayAnimationInRespinGame(col: number) {\\n        const newCol = col + 1;\\n        if (this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame) {\\n            // 前一列退出動畫（僅當該列本輪曾播過進入動畫時才播）\\n            if (col >= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_START && col <= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_END && this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col]) {\\n                this.PlayOutAnimationInRespinGame(col);\\n            }\\n\\n            // 新一列進入動畫\\n            if (newCol <= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_END) {\\n                this.PlayInAnimationInRespinGame(newCol);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *  @ch 停止所有RespinGame 的動畫\\n     */\\n    private async StopAllRespinGameAnimation() {\\n        if (!this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        for (let col = Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_START; col <= Game_Define.MIDDLE_COLS_END; col++) {\\n            if (this.m_respinEnterPlayedCols[col]) {\\n                this.PlayOutAnimationInRespinGame(col);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion RespinGame\\n\\n    // ==================== 變速轉輪 API ====================\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定指定輪的加速度（支援 NearMiss 聽牌降速）\\n     * @param col 目標轉輪索引 (0 ~ COL-1)\\n     * @param newAcc 新加速度（1.0 = 正常，0.25 = 降速至 1/4）\\n     */\\n    SetReelAcceleration( col: number, newAcc: number ): void\\n    {\\n        // BC-4：已進入停輪動畫的輪，忽略呼叫\\n        const stopLocal = this.m_reelStopLocalTime[ col ];\\n        if ( stopLocal === null ) return;\\n        if ( this.m_reelLocalTime[ col ] >= stopLocal ) return;\\n\\n        // EH guard：加速度不可為零（避免除以零）\\n        if ( newAcc <= 0 ) return;\\n\\n        const T = this.m_time;\\n\\n        // BC-5：更新加速度，建立工作陣列並計算本輪新的全局停輪時間\\n        this.m_reelAcceleration[ col ] = newAcc;\\n        const globalStop: number[] = this.m_reelStopTime.map( v => v ?? 0 );\\n        const remaining = stopLocal - this.m_reelLocalTime[ col ];\\n        globalStop[ col ] = this.ToolsStrip( T + remaining / newAcc );\\n        this.m_reelStopTime[ col ] = globalStop[ col ];  // 同步全局停輪時間（供 Spin_RealSpinMultiple 使用）\\n\\n        // BC-6 / BC-7：Cascade 調整後輪，確保停輪順序（支援推遲與拉回兩個方向）\\n        for ( let c = col + 1; c < Game_Define.COL; ++c )\\n        {\\n            const cStopLocal = this.m_reelStopLocalTime[ c ];\\n            if ( cStopLocal === null || this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ] >= cStopLocal ) break; // 已停輪\\n\\n            const spinTime = this.CalSpinTime( c, false );\\n            const respinExtraInterval = this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame ? this.m_respinExtraIntervalSpin : 0;\\n            const spinInterval = (this.m_spinIntervalTimes + respinExtraInterval) * spinTime;\\n            const minGlobalStop = globalStop[ c - 1 ] + spinInterval;\\n\\n            const minLocalTime = ( minGlobalStop - T ) * this.m_reelAcceleration[ c ] + this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ];\\n\\n            // 維持與上一輪的相對 local time 差距（含聽牌額外圈數）\\n            // 使用 globalStop[c-1]（BC-5 重算後的新值）換算到 reel c 的 local frame，避免讀到變速前的舊值\\n            const prevLocalStop = ( globalStop[ c - 1 ] - T ) * this.m_reelAcceleration[ c ] + this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ];\\n            const baseRelativeDiff = Math.max( 0, this.m_reelStopLocalTimeBase[ c ] - this.m_reelStopLocalTimeBase[ c - 1 ] );\\n            const relativeMinLocal = prevLocalStop + baseRelativeDiff;\\n            // relativeMinLocal 可能因加速度換算產生非整圈的小數，需 ceil 對齊 spinTime(c)，\\n            // 否則後輪停在非整圈位置，假轉輪帶與真實符號不同步造成瞬切\\n            const relativeMinLocalAligned = Math.ceil( relativeMinLocal / spinTime ) * spinTime;\\n\\n            // 不得低於 StartSpin 原始排程（含 tease extra spins），防止加速時 cascade 吃掉後輪的額外圈數\\n            const newStopLocal = this.ToolsStrip( Math.max(\\n                Math.ceil( minLocalTime / spinTime ) * spinTime,\\n                this.m_reelStopLocalTimeBase[ c ],\\n                relativeMinLocalAligned\\n            ) );\\n\\n            if ( newStopLocal === cStopLocal ) break; // 無需調整，後續輪也不受影響\\n            globalStop[ c ] = this.ToolsStrip( T + ( newStopLocal - this.m_reelLocalTime[ c ] ) / this.m_reelAcceleration[ c ] );\\n            this.m_reelStopLocalTime[ c ] = newStopLocal;\\n            this.m_reelPreLocalTime[ c ] = this.ToolsStrip( newStopLocal - spinTime );\\n            this.m_reelStopTime[ c ] = globalStop[ c ];  // 同步全局停輪時間\\n            this.m_reelPreTime[ c ] = this.m_reelPreLocalTime[ c ];\\n        }\\n\\n        // BC-8：更新整體 StopTime（考慮每輪慢動作的 buffer 時間膨脹）\\n        let maxStopWithBuffer = 0;\\n        for ( let i = 0; i < Game_Define.COL; ++i )\\n        {\\n            if ( this.m_lockColumn[ i ] ) continue;\\n            const scale = content.thinking:
The user made a code edit to `SlotReels.ts`. Let me analyze what changed:

**Old code (line 2704):**
```typescript
const featurePosQueue = Common.ParseFeaturePosQueue( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.[0]?.FeaturePosQueue ?? [] );
```

**New code (lines 2704-2706):**
```typescript
// 改 [sub]：SetPlateInfo 每手呼叫、content 已是當前手盤面，scatter/collect 計數須同手
//（sub=0 即 NormalGame/FG 首手與原 [0] 等價；Respin 續轉手 [sub] 無 scatter→計數 0，正確化）
const featurePosQueue = Common.ParseFeaturePosQueue( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.[ this.m_gameView.CurSubPlateIndex ]?.FeaturePosQueue ?? [] );
```

**What changed:**
- Changed from accessing `PlateQueue[0]` (always first plate) to `PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]` (current sub-plate index)
- Added detailed Chinese comments explaining:
  - SetPlateInfo is called for each hand, content is the current hand's plate
  - Scatter/collect counting must be synchronized with the current hand
  - sub=0 for NormalGame/FG first hand is equivalent to original [0]
  - For Respin continuation hands, [sub] with no scatter → count becomes 0, correctly

This is a bugfix related to the business logic discussed at the beginning about RoundQueue, PlateQueue, MainGame, FreeGame, and Respin. The issue is that when calculating scatter totals, the code was always reading from index [0], but it should read from the current sub-plate index to handle Respin chains correctly.
The fix corrects how feature position queues are accessed during Respin sequences by using the current sub-plate index instead of always defaulting to the first plate, ensuring scatter and collect counts align with the actual game state.

content.thinking:
The user wrote a feedback document about workflow args being too verbose. This is a process improvement observation - documenting a lesson learned about how to structure workflow arguments to avoid infinite loops in explore agents.

Key points:
- dev-design/dev-review workflow args should be concise
- Should only include "requirement + confirmed facts + direction"
- Should NOT include exhaustive checklists
- A recent incident had 966 tool calls over 1.5 hours without convergence
- Normal explore agents should converge in dozens of tool calls
- Solution: keep detailed checklists in main agent, give high-level context in workflow args
- If tool count exceeds 200, stop early and simplify

This is a decision/discovery type observation about project workflow optimization.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>decision</type>
  <title>Workflow Args Should Be Concise to Prevent Explore Agent Loops</title>
  <subtitle>Dev-design and dev-review workflows should receive high-level context only, not exhaustive checklists, to avoid agent convergence failures.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Dev-design and dev-review workflow args should contain requirement plus confirmed facts plus direction only</fact>
    <fact>Exhaustive verification checklists in workflow args cause explore agents to enter enumeration loops</fact>
    <fact>On 2026-06-10, verbose workflow args led to 966 tool calls over 1.5 hours without convergence, requiring TaskStop</fact>
    <fact>Normal explore agents should converge within dozens of tool calls, not hundreds</fact>
    <fact>If tool count exceeds 200 in a single phase, intervention is needed</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Documented a critical workflow design principle after experiencing an explore agent failure. When dev-design or dev-review workflows receive arguments containing exhaustive checklists (item-by-item verification lists, decision matrices, detailed check points), the explore agent attempts to verify every single item, creating an enumeration loop that fails to converge. A recent incident required 966 tool calls over 1.5 hours before being forcibly stopped. The solution is to keep workflow arguments at a high conceptual level (requirement, confirmed facts, general direction) and leave detailed checklists for the main agent's inline processing. Early intervention is recommended if tool counts exceed 200 in a single phase.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
